title: SCP-323, Wendigo Skull
description: An anomalous skull that lures victims close, consuming them to manifest a starving wendigo.
body:
The Wendigo Skull adds a new creature. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-323 also known as the Wendigo Skull.


SCP-323 exists in two connected states. A mobile skull and its manifested form, SCP-323-1. Players who remain near the skull for too long risk losing control of their body, suffering damage, or triggering its transformation. Once SCP-323 evolves, it becomes an active hunter that stalks players and villagers, growing stronger or weaker depending on whether it has fed recently. The anomaly can be temporarily managed, but hunger will always return. Killing SCP-323-1 causes it to drop the skull again, allowing the cycle to begin once more.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-323 spawn?

SCP-323 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-323,

</details>



![SCP-323](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a55fe51659d6e097620aaf0cf65c0a5f626e1070_0.webp)

SCP-323 appears as a wendigo skull that can be picked up or placed. While seemingly harmless, the skull is capable of moving on its own if damaged, slowly walking or leaping away. If a player remains within eight blocks for too long, SCP-323 begins to influence them, dealing damage, inducing hunger, and occasionally forcing uncontrolled arm movements. Direct contact with SCP-323 is always fatal. When a player collides with the skull, they are instantly killed, causing SCP-323 to manifest as SCP-323-1. SCP-323-1 is a tall, thin humanoid creature wearing the wendigo skull, with blackened skin and sharp claws. It stalks nearby players when idle and becomes highly aggressive when hungry. The creature’s strength depends on feeding. After killing a player or villager, it temporarily weakens and slows, but prolonged hunger makes it faster, stronger, and able to detect prey from far away, even without direct sight. If SCP-323-1 remains unfed for too long, it begins to deteriorate, losing strength, speed, and advanced abilities such as dashing or breaking blocks. It may speak unsettling phrases like “Always so hungry” or “So cold” while hunting. The creature can be calmed by feeding it raw beef, delaying its aggression.  When SCP-323-1 is killed, it drops the Wendigo Skull, returning the anomaly to its initial state and allowing the cycle to repeat.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
